metadata.description: Community-driven marketplace for Claude Code commands and plugins

plugins.name: plugin-security-scanner
plugins.description: Security scan Claude Code plugins, skills, MCP servers, and hooks for prompt injection, tool poisoning, silent exfiltration, credential harvesting, cross-MCP contamination, and supply-chain risks. Accepts a plugin folder, GitHub repo (owner/name or URL), single skill/MCP file, or pasted content.

plugins.name: experienced-engineer
plugins.description: Comprehensive plugin with specialized engineering subagents (API Architect, Security Specialist, Code Quality Reviewer, etc.) and productivity commands for software teams

plugins.name: documentation-expert
plugins.description: Improve, and maintain project documentation. Specializes in technical writing.

plugins.name: security-auditor
plugins.description: Review code for vulnerabilities, implement secure authentication, and ensure OWASP compliance.
